title: Persona for a Video Game Character
scenario: Create a persona for a new video game character. The target output should be a detailed persona description.
constraints: Must include a brief description of the character's personality
Must highlight the character's motivations and goals

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the constraints met (personality, motivations, goals)?
Does the description showcase a compelling and engaging tone?
Does the description accurately answer the prompt regarding the character's role in the game?
